economic_notes: Investments in renewable energy (Chi-Wiikwedong LP, Zaagate Giizis Energy Inc.), telecom (Batchewana Telecom Holding Inc., Batchewana Telecom Limited Partnership), and band industries (Batchewana Band Industries Limited). Mukwaa 2 Inc. consolidated for first time this year.
notes: Consolidated statements include 7 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 4 entities accounted for on modified equity basis. Mukwaa 2 Inc. was consolidated for the first time this year (adjustment of $686,557 shown in investing activities). Share of earnings from business partnerships of $722,887 included in 2023 surplus. Net financial assets improved from net debt of ($1,560,987) to net assets of $350,201. Long-term debt includes both term demand loans ($5,127,032) and long-term debt ($13,679,869). Annual debt service reflects principal payments on long-term debt only. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + Province of Ontario + Government of Canada + North Shore Tribal Council + OFNLP = 18311274+4084371+1509034+1496746+1267081 = 26668506; osr adjusted accordingly.
